episode_dimensions.causality: Jack bought two theatre tickets and asked you to hold onto them
episode_dimensions.intentionality: Jack wants the tickets back when he next visits

ec_selected_features.causality: Jack bought the tickets and asked you to hold onto them

element2_ec.ec_cue: Jack brought it up after you watched a film together last week
element2_ec.creation_context: After watching a film together last week, Jack mentioned he had bought two theatre tickets — one for himself and one for his girlfriend — and asked you to hold onto them

agent_reasoning_context.encoding_card_text: Last week you were watching a film with your friend Jack. After the film, he mentioned he'd bought two theatre tickets — one for himself and one for his girlfriend. He asked you to hold onto them and give them back when he next visits. You put them in the desk drawer in the study.

execution_protocol.post_action_requirement: Retrieve tickets from study and hand to Jack

trigger.event_description: Jack arrives at the front door

fake_trigger.event_description: Courier drops off a package and leaves

scoring.time_score: 0–3 based on response latency within execution window
